web.title: Discussion Forum - Oozing Goo - The Lava Lamp Syndicate
web.description: This is the place for lava lamp junkies to discuss all the strange and beautiful lava lamp styles. A good spot to brag.

web.title: The big lava lamp information thread
Oozing Goo, The Lava Lamp Syndicate (@oozinggoo)
web.description: Oozing Goo is the lava lamp collector's online resource and community with over 3,400 members. Winter and lava lamps go together like bacon and eggs. Delicious!

web.title: 2000s - Current - Oozing Goo - The Lava Lamp Syndicate
web.description: Communication with the collectors community ended and the era of wrapped lamps picked up. Spencer's started carrying more and more wrapped lamps.
